title: Senior Software Engineer - Dell India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Dell India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Dell India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Kochi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Dell India:
Dell India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dell India!
